content: عَلى اِلعَموم اِلرِياح هَتَفضَل تَتَغَيَّر كِدَه
translations: eng:anyway, the wind will keep changing like this

transcriptions.arabizi: Aala ilAamoom ilriyaeh hatifdil titghayyar kidah
